Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-15-2004 Continued To Aug-13-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Effie F. Anastassiou, Esq. (831) 754-2501 for Petitioner and Moving Party Seminis Vegetable Seeds, Inc.
Matthew F. Miller, Esq., Schnader Harrison Segal & Lewis LLP (415) 364-6743 for Respondent and Opposing Party Abbot & Cobb, Inc.
Denean K. Sturino, Esq., Lord Bissell & Brook LLP (312) 443-0700 for Respondent and Opposing Party Abbot & Cobb, Inc.
RULING:
A R G U E D. Pursuant to CCP 1286, PETITIONER SEMINIS VEGETABLE SEEDS, INC.'S Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is GRANTED; award is confirmed as entered. Counsel are DIRECTED to contact the arbitrators, explain the dispute and submit a form of non-disclosure agreement. If a resolution is not reached by the parties, PETITIONER SEMINIS VEGETABLE SEEDS, INC.'S Hearing Re Arbitration Award is CONTINUED to 08/13/04 in Dept. 301. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
